summary: Wired entry/exit/resolution attribution code paths with new backfill script for existing trades
notes: Entry wiring captures entry_model_prob (from signal.fair_value_estimate), entry_market_prob (from orderbook ask), expected_edge_pct, and actual_fill_px/size
Exit wiring captures exit_reason (passed from check_exit), exit_market_prob (from orderbook bid), hold_seconds (calculated from ts_open), realized_pnl from close_position
Resolution wiring populates resolved_winner (YES/NO), model_side_was_right (bool), trade_class (via classify_trade), and exit_reason=RESOLUTION
Both entry and exit attribution written to JSONL envelope with timestamp + record structure per attribution.py spec
Backfill script reconstructs from trade_forensics logs and close_reason inference, sets attribution_version=0 for incomplete, =1 for complete reconstructions
Backfill is idempotent: only updates NULL fields, sets trade_class=UNRESOLVED for non-resolved trades
No change to entry/exit decision logic, only observation/record — all wiring is read-only on existing code paths

exit_attribution_fields: exit_reason: reason parameter from check_exit return
exit_model_prob: NULL (no model signal at exit)
exit_market_prob: ob.bid_yes/bid_no per side or close_data exit_px
resolution_attribution_fields: resolved_winner: YES or NO based on exit_px at resolution (>=0.99 → YES else NO)
trade_class: result of classify_trade(model_side_was_right, expected_edge_pct, exit_reason=RESOLUTION, realized_pnl)

db_changes.behavior: Idempotent UPDATE via dynamic SQL, only updates non-None values in attr_data dict

backfill_logic.input: Trades with any NULL attribution column
reconstruction_sources: pnl_usd sign for model direction check

version_semantics.attribution_version_0: Best-effort reconstruction, incomplete fields, may be inaccurate

backfill_logic.idempotent_upsert: Only updates NULL columns, safe to re-run

testing_guidance: Open new trade in paper mode, verify entry attribution written to JSONL and DB
Close trade via TP/SL/exit gate, verify exit attribution fields in DB
Run resolution watcher and observe market resolution, verify resolved_winner + model_side_was_right + trade_class populated
Run backfill script with --dry-run to preview changes, then without flag to persist
Verify JSONL records use attribution_version=1 for new trades, verify backfill uses version=0/1 appropriately
